{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# Mixture of Experts {#sec-mixture-of-experts}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## In this chapter
<!-- Decoupling parameter count from compute per token: route each token to a
     few of many expert MLPs. -->
:::

**Learning objectives.**

<!-- TODO -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Sparse experts

<!-- Replace the MLP (@sec-mlp-activations) with many; a router picks top-k.
     Parameters grow, FLOPs per token do not. -->

## Routing and its pathologies

<!-- Load balancing, auxiliary losses, capacity factors; why routing is
     finicky. -->

## Systems implications

<!-- Expert parallelism and all-to-all communication; ties to
     @sec-systems-at-scale. -->

## Exercises {.unnumbered}

<!-- TODO -->

## Further reading {.unnumbered}
